metadata.description: Custom Claude Code plugins for design + development workflows.

plugins.name: dd-a11y
plugins.description: WCAG 2.2 accessibility audit — Playwright + axe-core, single or multi-page, generates client deliverables.

plugins.name: dd-blogs
plugins.description: ldnddev brand-tone copywriting skill — produces blog HTML markup, ld+json, SEO meta, and social posts.

plugins.name: dd-framework
plugins.description: ldnddev Framework component skill — guides AI agents to add and configure framework components correctly.

plugins.name: dd-seo
plugins.description: Deterministic LLM-first SEO audits for sites, blog posts, and GitHub repos — schema, CWV, AEO/GEO, prioritized fixes.

plugins.name: dd-vreg
plugins.description: Visual regression reporter — desktop/mobile screenshot diffing across two sites with Markdown + HTML reports.
